findings.finding: 24 signals compute every cycle (290K+ calls) but produce zero accuracy samples because outcome_tracker skips HOLD votes. Shadow tracking was designed to solve this but fails because disabled signals vote HOLD, and HOLD votes are skipped.
findings.relevance_to_us: Cannot validate or promote any of 24 shadow signals without fixing this

findings.finding: The _detect_append() function uses count-delta heuristic that breaks at the 5000-line prune cap. telegram_messages.jsonl at cap causes false telegram_sent=false, triggering 22 false contract violations. Agents actually working correctly.
findings.relevance_to_us: Eliminates 22 false critical error alerts, reduces noise in monitoring
findings.source: Root cause analysis of agent_invocation.py lines 640-662

findings.finding: news_event signal surging from 51% to 75.8% (1d) and 70% (3h) with substantial samples. Currently disabled. Several other disabled signals showing recent improvement: trend (61.6% 3h), volatility_sig (60.2% 3h), smart_money (63.2% 3h).
findings.relevance_to_us: Potential accuracy improvement by enabling hot signals

findings.finding: williams_vix_fix has 30.5% recent accuracy (131 samples) but is rescued for XAU and XAG per-ticker. This is actively harmful - worse than random.
findings.relevance_to_us: Directly harming metals consensus (primary trading instruments)

findings.finding: Strong divergence between horizons: ministral 58% 1d but 37.5% 3d. fear_greed 58.6% 1d and 68.7% 3d. econ_calendar 55.5% 1d_all but 32.7% 1d_recent. Signals should be weighted per-horizon, not uniformly.
findings.relevance_to_us: Horizon-specific weighting could improve consensus by 3-5pp

findings.finding: econ_calendar votes BUY 99% of time across all tickers. fear_greed votes 100% BUY (0 SELL ever). gold_overnight_bias BUY 77%. hash_ribbons BUY permanently. These create systematic BUY bias in consensus even when gated.
findings.relevance_to_us: Systematic BUY bias can leak through gate relaxation circuit breaker

recommended_improvements.title: Fix _detect_append() for pruned files
recommended_improvements.description: Replace count-delta with timestamp-based detection or baseline after prune

recommended_improvements.title: Remove williams_vix_fix from PER_TICKER_RESCUE for XAU/XAG
recommended_improvements.description: 30.5% recent accuracy is actively harmful. Remove from rescue set.

recommended_improvements.title: Add ministral to per-horizon blacklist for 3d/5d/10d
recommended_improvements.description: 37.5% at 3d, should only vote at 1d and shorter horizons

recommended_improvements.title: Fix shadow signal outcome tracking
recommended_improvements.description: Track directional output of shadow signals even when vote is gated to HOLD

recommended_improvements.title: Resolve false critical error alerts from L2 detection
recommended_improvements.description: Resolve the 22 false contract_violation entries in critical_errors.jsonl
